Be a Smart Banker

Every graduate deserves a professional career.

Home / About TrueKnack

TRUEKNACK — THE KNACK OF FINDING TRUE TALENT

TrueKnack has come up with a clear vision to train and prepare graduates from Indian Universities to perform well in the Banking industry. TrueKnack is paving a remarkable path for all those aspirants who want to make banking as a career.

TrueKnack's objective is to cater to the manpower needs of the exponentially growing Banking sector in India.

In the last 3+ years, TrueKnack has trained more than 6,000 students, and on completion of their respective programs, they have secured jobs with Banks as KYC/AML Compliance Officers, Tellers - Cash & Remittances, Relationship Managers, Personal Banker's and Wealth Managers.

TrueKnack has offline centers and online counseling hubs active throughout Maharashtra to provide localized expert training.

Our Aim

To create 10,000+ Bankers by the year 2030

Our Mission

Our mission is to inspire and empower the youth to build a successful career in banking and finance industry, by providing them world class education, through supportive and engaging learning environment. We are dedicated to transform the lives of our students and their families while fostering the growth for banking & finance industry, our centers and staff members.

Our Vision

To be India’s most trusted banking educational institute transforming the lives of the youth by making them employable and providing quality manpower to the banking & finance industry.

Core Values: The Standards That Define Who We Are

Driven by Excellence

We bring our highest quality, care, and dedication to everything we do — every single day.

Fast & Empathetic Response

We listen with full attention and respond with genuine urgency to every student, parent, partner, and colleague.

Trust & Loyalty

We say what we mean, deliver what we promise, and build every relationship on a foundation of integrity.

Respect & Recognition

We treat every individual with dignity and ensure every effort and contribution is acknowledged and celebrated.

Ownership & Accountability

We take complete ownership of our responsibilities, act with initiative, and deliver results with pride.

Continuous Learning & Growth

We invest in our skills, knowledge, and mindset every day — because our growth powers TrueKnack's growth.

Openness to Feedback & Evolution

We welcome honest feedback and use it to continuously raise our performance and evolve as professionals.

Our Process Flow

1

Application

Fill an online application or walk in to a TrueKnack center with all your educational documents.

2

Screen Test

Attend a face-to-face interview with our senior ex-bankers, carrying your academic records.

3

Shortlisted

If shortlisted in the screening test, secure your seat by submitting the fees as guided by the center head.

4

Training

Undergo training for 3 Months, along with modular assessment tests conducted each fortnight.

What you get by enrolling in TrueKnack

After completion of our Smart Banker Program course, students would understand Banking as a core business function and basic principles of Retail Banking and its products.

This program enables the students to capture dynamic realities of Financial Inclusion while emphasizing different aspects of banking, prospecting and CASA acquisition, complaint resolution, and other elements of customer service.

For the successful completion of the program, the candidate should have 90% attendance and 70% marks in the internal exams conducted by TrueKnack.

On the basis of attendance, punctuality & content knowledge, TrueKnack certifies the candidates for the Certified Retail Banking Program that enables them to work with a Bank as an Officer.

CONTACT US
